Package neqsim.process.safety.inventory

Class TrappedInventoryCalculator.InventorySegment

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.inventory.TrappedInventoryCalculator.InventorySegment
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
TrappedInventoryCalculator
public static class TrappedInventoryCalculator.InventorySegment extends Object implements Serializable
A documented isolated-volume segment.

  • Constructor Details

    • InventorySegment

      private InventorySegment(String id, String type, double volumeM3, double liquidFillFraction)
      Creates an inventory segment.
      Parameters:
      id - segment identifier
      type - segment type, for example pipe or equipment
      volumeM3 - segment internal volume in m3
      liquidFillFraction - liquid fill fraction from 0 to 1
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if values are invalid

  • Method Details

    • addEvidence

      public TrappedInventoryCalculator.InventorySegment addEvidence(DocumentEvidence evidence)
      Adds traceable document evidence.
      Parameters:
      evidence - evidence to add; must not be null
      Returns:
      this segment for chained setup
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if evidence is null

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Gets the segment identifier.
      Returns:
      segment identifier

    • getType

      public String getType()
      Gets the segment type.
      Returns:
      segment type

    • getVolumeM3

      public double getVolumeM3()
      Gets segment volume.
      Returns:
      internal volume in m3

    • getLiquidFillFraction

      public double getLiquidFillFraction()
      Gets liquid fill fraction.
      Returns:
      liquid fill fraction from 0 to 1

    • getInternalDiameterM

      public double getInternalDiameterM()
      Gets pipe internal diameter when supplied.
      Returns:
      internal diameter in m, or NaN for non-pipe segments

    • getLengthM

      public double getLengthM()
      Gets pipe length when supplied.
      Returns:
      length in m, or NaN for non-pipe segments

    • getEvidence

      public List<DocumentEvidence> getEvidence()
      Gets evidence records.
      Returns:
      immutable evidence list

    • setInternalDiameterM

      private void setInternalDiameterM(double internalDiameterM)
      Sets pipe geometry metadata.
      Parameters:
      internalDiameterM - pipe internal diameter in m

    • setLengthM

      private void setLengthM(double lengthM)
      Sets pipe length metadata.
      Parameters:
      lengthM - pipe length in m
